command: ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.202 "echo  | base64 -d | sudo tee /etc/systemd/system/hermes-gateway.service > /dev/null && echo written && sudo systemctl daemon-reload && sudo systemctl enable hermes-gateway && sudo systemctl start hermes-gateway && sleep 15 && systemctl is-active hermes-gateway && ss -tlnp | grep 8080 | head -1"
